detaileddescription.para: This file should be included in the example files and compiled along with the examples (*.c). MODIFICATION HISTORY:

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 sb 8/20/24 Initial release 1.0 sb 9/25/24 Add XSfl_FlashRead API and callback for non blocking transfer in XSfl_CntrlInfo. 1.1 sb 01/28/25 Add support to read in stig when DMA is not available. 1.1 sb 02/11/25 Add support for x2/x4 operation. 1.3 zm 03/09/26 Add support for W25Q128JW Winbond flash.
